infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Charm City Nights needs camera access to capture your nights out.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Charm City Nights needs microphone access to record video stories.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Charm City Nights needs photo library access to save your captured moments.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Charm City Nights to access your camera to capture moments at your favorite venues.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Charm City Nights to access your microphone to record video stories.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Charm City Nights to save your captured moments to your photo library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Charm City Nights to save photos and videos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Charm City Nights to use your location to find nearby bars and check in.
